title: Floralis
description: A large combat expansion to the Cherry Grove
body:
# **Features**

## **Blossom Scythe**
  Pulls in enemies while attacking and applies standard sword enchantments as well as Floralis  
  specific ones.

  **Special enchantments**:
  
  **Bloom**: Creates a burst of cherry petals, slowing opponents and disabling regeneration.
  
  **Quick Step**: Launches the player forward in a gliding dash.

## **Cherry Glaive**
  A lighter and faster weapon with increased attack speed compared to the scythe.
  Applies standard sword enchantments along with Floralis’ custom ones.
  
  Special enchantment:
  Slashing: Inflicts Bleeding for 10 seconds.
  Can also be applied to axes and tridents.

## **Flower Compass**
  Allows the player to set their spawn point anywhere by sneaking and right-clicking a block.
  The compass will then point toward that location until reset.
 
## **Enchantments**

  **Bloom**
  Creates a burst of cherry petals that slows nearby opponents.
  Applicable to the Blossom Scythe
  
  **Quick Step**
  Launches the player forward with a gliding dash.
  Applicable to the Blossom Scythe
  
  **Slashing**
  Inflicts 10 seconds of bleeding on hits. 
  Applicable to Axes, Tridents, and Floralis Weapons

  **Blood Rhythm**
  Each crit will add one to the current blood stack; each stack deals BaseDamage x 0.45 x 
  Stacks, the attack is released by Shift-Right-Click. 
  Applicable to Swords and Tridents, along with Floralis Weapons

## **Status Effects**

  **Bloomed**
  Entities affected by Bloom are slowed down and emit cherry petals.
  
  **Bleeding**
  Every second the effect has been active, the player with the effect will take 2.5% more
  Melee damage, the scaling resets after being hit.

## **Materials**

  **Seraphite**
  A pale pink ingot used to craft certain Floralis weapons and tools that's made using 
  netherite.

  **Sakura Shard**
  A pink shard created through the transformation of echo shards.
